coreIssue: Lesley, a manager, has been arriving late to work consistently. This check-in aims to uncover whether her lateness is due to workload pressures, personal circumstances, or energy management issues. It is important to understand how this pattern affects her daily routine and overall energy levels. Additionally, aligning on her current priorities will help determine if her focus areas might be contributing to her punctuality issues. Exploring these elements will provide insight into how you can better support her and address any underlying issues.
openingQuestion: Lesley, I've noticed you've been arriving late recently, and I'd like to understand if there are any workload pressures or other factors contributing to this pattern. Can you share your thoughts?
listenFor: if they have personal circumstances affecting punctuality
whether energy levels are impacting daily routine
avoid: do not assume it's purely a time management issue
do not pressure for immediate solutions
goodOutcome: You will understand the root cause of Lesley's lateness and how it relates to her workload, energy, and priorities.
suggestedAction: Discuss potential adjustments or support that could help Lesley manage her time and energy better.
